description_long: This is an outdoor stage setup featuring a raised platform with a geometric, stepped design and a prominent front staircase. The stage is flanked by two large, vertical signboards or display panels, each mounted on posts and decorated with abstract graphics. A decorative archway with angular supports and gold accents marks the entrance to the stage area, leading up the central staircase. The stage structure itself is solid and blocky, with a black and white color scheme and gold highlights, giving it a modern, slightly Art Deco appearance. Additional small decorative elements, such as spherical lights or ornaments, are arranged symmetrically along the approach to the stage. The overall design suggests a formal or ceremonial function, suitable for performances, speeches, or public gatherings in an urban park or plaza.
description: A modern, geometric stage with a raised platform, central staircase, and decorative archway, flanked by two large signboards and gold-accented details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central staircase, decorative archway, and both signboards leading up to the main stage platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stage platform and the arrangement of decorative elements along the approach.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, stepped structure of the stage and the back of the signboards and archway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stage's blocky profile and the alignment of the approach elements.
